title: Fall Mood
body:
welcome to fall mood! this mod adds 2 new fall related biomes! the pumpkin fields, and the autumn forest! find giant pumpkins and rarely giant jack o lanterns in the pumpkin fields, and clear light blue waters with orange trees in the autumn forest! this mod is great if you want some fall adventures!
you are free to use this in any modpack you like

made with MCreator
